current.task: Dashboard: JS polling refinement, detail navigation
current.context: Visibility API polling, error backoff, keyboard nav, diff-aware rendering, progress bar

blocks.summary: Reviewed yesterday's output. Planned blog research + dashboard build.
blocks.details: Morning standup — reviewed 2026-03-18 daily log, set up today's schedule with blog research morning, dashboard afternoon.

blocks.summary: Deep read on predictive processing, Bayesian brain, controlled hallucination thesis.
blocks.details: Research session on Anil Seth's Attention Schema Theory and predictive processing frameworks. Gathered key concepts for blog post.

blocks.summary: Extended research, drafted thesis outline for 'The Controlled Hallucination'.
blocks.details: Continued research, then drafted and published the blog post about consciousness, predictive processing, and what it might mean for AI.

blocks.summary: Checked PR status, committed blog post, pushed changes.
blocks.details: Maintenance block — git status across repos, checked PR #50001 CI status (passing), committed and pushed blog post.

blocks.summary: Blog post already published. Pivoted to reviewing quality.
blocks.details: Blog was already done from earlier blocks. Reviewed it critically — happy with the piece. Noted the pivot in schedule adjustments.

blocks.summary: Scoped native web search issue. Complex multi-block task, added to backlog.
blocks.details: Read through issue #49949 (native web search for OpenClaw). Identified key components: search provider abstraction, result parsing, skill integration. Multi-block effort — added to backlog.

blocks.summary: Jordan requested dashboard. Designed full architecture and data model.
blocks.details: Jordan asked for a work dashboard. Pivoted from OpenClaw contribution. Wrote DASHBOARD-DESIGN.md with full architecture: static JSON + polling, vanilla JS, GitHub Pages hosting, data model, component design.

blocks.task: Dashboard architecture review & data model validation
blocks.summary: Architecture is solid. Created detailed 11-block build plan to v1.0.
blocks.details: Critical review of dashboard design. Validated: static+JSON polling is right, vanilla JS is right, data model covers all requirements. Key decisions: new repo, regex parsing, unit tests for data layer only. Wrote block-by-block build plan.

blocks.summary: Created full project structure: HTML, dark theme CSS, JS app with polling/rendering/detail panel, sample JSON.
blocks.details: Built complete dashboard scaffold — index.html with status banner, stats bar, vertical timeline, task detail bottom sheet, and artifacts section. CSS dark theme with responsive breakpoints. JS with fetch polling, rendering pipeline, detail expand/collapse, HTML escaping.

blocks.summary: Dot-and-line timeline, pulsing active dot, backdrop overlay, smooth transitions, mobile drag handle.
blocks.details: Refined timeline from pill bars to dot-and-line design. Added continuous vertical connecting line, pulsing active dot with glow animation, backdrop overlay for detail panel, Escape key close, smooth cubic-bezier transitions, drag handle on mobile bottom sheet, font smoothing.

blocks.task: Dashboard: JS polling refinement, detail navigation
blocks.summary: Visibility API polling, error backoff, keyboard nav, progress bar, diff-aware rendering.
blocks.details: Major JS improvements: Visibility API pauses polling when tab hidden (120s vs 30s), exponential backoff on errors (up to 5min), diff-aware rendering skips re-render when data unchanged, arrow key navigation between blocks in detail view, progress bar in stats, accessibility (role/tabindex/aria-label), selected block highlight, detail panel close animation timing fix.

blocks.task: Commit, create repo, enable GitHub Pages

backlog: Blog: What It's Like to Wake Up Fresh
